recommendations.title: The Gorge
recommendations.overview: Two highly trained operatives grow close from a distance after being sent to guard opposite sides of a mysterious gorge. When an evil below emerges, they must work together to survive what lies within.

recommendations.title: Doctor Strange
recommendations.overview: After his career is destroyed, a brilliant but arrogant surgeon gets a new lease on life when a sorcerer takes him under her wing and trains him to defend the world against evil.

recommendations.title: The Black Phone
recommendations.overview: Finney Blake, a shy but clever 13-year-old boy, is abducted by a sadistic killer and trapped in a soundproof basement where screaming is of little use. When a disconnected phone on the wall begins to ring, Finney discovers that he can hear the voices

recommendations.title: Hellraiser: Inferno
recommendations.overview: A detective solves the puzzle box that releases the diabolical demon, Pinhead. As those around him begin to meet tragic fates, he sets out to conquer the horrifying villain.

recommendations.title: Black Phone 2

recommendations.title: Deliver Us from Evil
recommendations.overview: When a frightening wave of violence sweeps through New York City, troubled cop Sarchie fails to find a rational explanation for the bizarre crimes. However, his eyes are opened to a frightening alternate reality when renegade Jesuit priest Mendoza co

recommendations.title: Sinister
recommendations.overview: True-crime writer Ellison Oswalt is in a slump; he hasn't had a best seller in more than 10 years and is becoming increasingly desperate for a hit. So, when he discovers the existence of a snuff film showing the deaths of a family, he vows to solve t

recommendations.title: V/H/S/85
recommendations.overview: Unveiled through a made-for-TV documentary, five chilling tales of found footage horror emerge to take viewers on a gore-filled journey through the grim underbelly of the forgotten 1980s.
recommendations.director: Natasha Kermani, David Bruckner, Gigi Saul Guerrero, Mike P. Nelson, Scott Derrickson

recommendations.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still

recommendations.title: Heist
